---
title: "Da Website"
format: html
editor: visual
---

This is my website about [penguins](https://animalia-life.club/qa/pictures/images-of-penguins)

## Data

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggthemes)
library(palmerpenguins)
library(gt)
```

```{r}
glimpse(penguins)
```

## Species

```{r}


ggplot(
  penguins,  aes( x= bill_length_mm, y= bill_depth_mm, color = species, shape = species)) +
  geom_point() + theme_minimal() + labs(x = "Bill Length mm", 
          y = "Bill Depth mm")

```
